game_info.title: Redungeon Clone
game_info.concept:
The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/redungeon/id1119569595

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The wall in front of me starts to shake and hurtles towards me….I’m dead!
Spike holes are underfoot it’s already too late …I’m dead! 
I take my last breath as the slime creature engulfs me….I’m dead!

Like always I’m brought back to try again….is someone helping me or do they just really want me to hurt?

Enter the world of Redungeon!


Features:
• Endless, random, increasingly difficult dungeons.
• Dozens of complex traps carefully designed to stop you.
• Unlockable characters, each with unique game-changing skills!
• Great music by Dave Cowen, the composer behind Leap Day and Rust Bucket. 
• Lots of angry, colourful pixels (and a few friendly ones).
• Swipe controls or on-screen buttons.


Important information:
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other Nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In-App Purchase.
game_info.description: Escape the endless dungeon! A deadly dark wall is chasing you from behind. Navigate through procedural traps, avoid spikes, dodge patrolling enemies, and keep moving forward. Collect gold coins for score. Reach a distance of 1000 to win, or die trying!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character
Space: Dash (moves quickly in movement direction)
Shift: Shield (temporary invulnerability, consumes score)
Z: Trigger interaction (if applicable)
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Unpause
R: Restart Game (from Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Automated progression to reach winning distance.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot detects the safe path ahead. It prioritizes moving UP (forward) to outrun the chasing wall. If a wall or trap is detected ahead via raycasting/box-checking, it moves Left or Right to bypass it. It uses the Dash (Space) capability when a clear long path is found to maximize distance.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character navigates through the dungeon, avoiding static walls and dynamic traps, eventually reaching a distance score of 1000 to trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot generates random movement inputs (Arrows) and action inputs (Space, Shift) every few frames to simulate chaotic player behavior.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game runs without crashing. The player will likely die quickly, triggering GAME_OVER_LOSE, verifying the state transition and restart functionality.
TEST_2.strategy: The bot generates random movement inputs (Arrows) and action inputs (Space, Shift) every few frames to simulate chaotic player behavior.
TEST_2.expected: The game runs without crashing. The player will likely die quickly, triggering GAME_OVER_LOSE, verifying the state transition and restart functionality.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot does nothing. It waits for the "Wall of Doom" (chasing threat) to catch up to the player.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player is consumed by the wall, health reaches 0, and the game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
TEST_3.strategy: The bot does nothing. It waits for the "Wall of Doom" (chasing threat) to catch up to the player.
TEST_3.expected: The player is consumed by the wall, health reaches 0, and the game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
